de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation
  • Enclosing class:
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule

    public static final class AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation
extends java.lang.Object
    This encapsulates all information from the rule application that is needed to apply the rule.
    See Also:
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp
